commands.author: solavrc

target.title: Fix voice-call streaming provider resolution
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`talk.catalog` reports `transcription.activeProvider` from the Talk/voice-call streaming config, but realtime transcription provider listing could return only the already-active runtime registry providers.

In a Gateway configured with `plugins.entries["voice-call"].config.streaming.provider = "xai"`, the failure mode was:

1. Gateway starts and can discover the xAI realtime transcription provider.
2. Another path activates an OpenAI-only runtime registry.
3. `talk.catalog` still reports `activeProvider: "xai"`, but `transcription.providers` only contains `openai`.
4. `talk.session.create` for Review voice then fails with `Realtime transcription provider "xai" is not configured`.

This patch keeps Talk-owned provider selection in Talk code. The generic capability resolver now accepts explicit `requestedProviderIds` and does not parse `voice-call` config directly. Talk passes its configured transcription provider IDs into the generic resolver, allowing the requested provider plugin to be cold-loaded when it is missing from the active registry.

## Implementation Notes

- Adds a generic `requestedProviderIds` option to `resolvePluginCapabilityProviders`.
- Keeps `plugins.entries["voice-call"].config.streaming` parsing in `talk-shared.ts`.
- Uses the Talk helper for both `talk.catalog` and `buildTalkTranscriptionConfig`, so catalog display and transcription session creation resolve against the same requested provider set.
- Updates regression coverage so the generic resolver test no longer depends on voice-call config shape.

## Evidence

Local validation on this branch:

```text
pnpm vitest run src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk.test.ts
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests       108 passed (108)
```

```text
pnpm exec oxlint src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.ts src/realtime-transcription/provider-registry.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk-shared.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk.ts src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk.test.ts
# passed
```

```text
pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.ts src/realtime-transcription/provider-registry.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk-shared.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk.ts src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.
```

```text
pnpm tsgo:test --pretty false
# passed
```

```text
pnpm lint:core
# passed
```

Regression evidence added in code:

- `src/plugins/capability-provider-runtime.test.ts` verifies that an explicitly requested realtime transcription provider (`xai`) is loaded when the active registry only contains `openai`.
- `src/gateway/server-methods/talk.test.ts` verifies that Talk catalog passes `voice-call.streaming.provider` into realtime transcription provider discovery as `requestedProviderIds`.
